About Izabella

Born between two worlds

Ischia, Italy

Hi, I'm Izabella

I'm a Denver-based boutique travel consultant, dual US-Italian citizen, and self-described high-maintenance traveler — which means I notice every detail, so you don't have to. I grew up moving between two cultures, two languages, and two entirely different ways of experiencing the world — and that upbringing gave me an understanding of the Mediterranean that goes far deeper than any guidebook.

I founded Dolce & Drift because I believe that travel should feel effortless, personal, and deeply meaningful. Too many people spend their dream vacations stressed about logistics, overwhelmed by options, or stuck at restaurants they found on the first page of Google. I wanted to change that.

Every itinerary I design is built from personal experience, genuine local relationships, and an obsessive attention to the details that turn a good trip into one you'll talk about for years.

🇺🇸 🇮🇹

An insider's perspective.
Deep Italian roots and years of Mediterranean travel open doors that most advisors simply can't.

When I'm not planning trips, you'll find me in Lafayette, Colorado — probably researching the next destination, testing a new restaurant, or convincing my friends to book flights.

What I believe in

✈

Travel without stress

Planning a trip should be exciting, not exhausting. I handle every detail so you can focus on the part that matters — actually going.

✨

Deeply personal

No two trips are alike. Every itinerary is built around you — your pace, your passions, your budget, and the experiences that will mean the most.

🌎

Insider access

Local guides, hidden restaurants, off-the-beaten-path villages — my connections open doors that most travelers never find on their own.

Ready to start planning?

Tell me where you're dreaming of going. I'll take care of everything else.
